title: Particl Joins Binance’s Transparency Initiative

primary_tag.name: News & Updates
primary_tag.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

tags.name: News & Updates
tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

plaintext:
Here Comes the V Label
We’re happy to let you all know that yesterday, Binance Info announced that
Particl joined its transparency initiative
[https://twitter.com/Binance_Info/status/1113739575967473664], earning the
project the V Label on their website.

This label is part of Binance Info’s transparency initiative, an effort in
making cryptocurrency projects keep their communities informed. It is also
directly in line with our own commitment towards transparency. Binance Info’s V
Label acts as a “verified” status, ensuring that the Particl page is officially
maintained by the team and that the information included in it are accurate and
up-to-date.

If you are a Binance user, you can now keep yourself up-to-date with all the
latest information about the Particl project by simply following and bookmarking
the link below.

Particl Project (PART) price, rating, news, and analysis - Binance Info
[https://info.binance.com/en/currencies/particl]
Binance Info is a professional and comprehensive information service platform
with a fast growing source of information…
[https://info.binance.com/en/currencies/particl]info.binance.com
[https://info.binance.com/en/currencies/particl]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About Binance Info
Binance Info is a cryptocurrency information platform, providing users with
accurate and comprehensive crypto market data, news, and project rating reports.
As an open information platform, Binance Info encourages all users to
participate in maintaining accurate information on crypto projects by creating
token profiles, editing missing or incorrect project information, contributing
to news sources, and more. Users can help the community better understand coins
and tokens.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
html:
Here Comes the V Label

We’re happy to let you all know that yesterday, Binance Info announced that Particl joined its transparency initiative, earning the project the V Label on their website.

This label is part of Binance Info’s transparency initiative, an effort in making cryptocurrency projects keep their communities informed. It is also directly in line with our own commitment towards transparency. Binance Info’s V Label acts as a “verified” status, ensuring that the Particl page is officially maintained by the team and that the information included in it are accurate and up-to-date.

If you are a Binance user, you can now keep yourself up-to-date with all the latest information about the Particl project by simply following and bookmarking the link below.

Binance Info is a cryptocurrency information platform, providing users with accurate and comprehensive crypto market data, news, and project rating reports. As an open information platform, Binance Info encourages all users to participate in maintaining accurate information on crypto projects by creating token profiles, editing missing or incorrect project information, contributing to news sources, and more. Users can help the community better understand coins and tokens.
